title: bidens pilosa var. minor
intro: Bidens pilosa var. minor is a lesser-known variety of the Bidens pilosa plant, commonly known as small beggarticks or small stick-tight. This plant is a type of flowering herb in the aster family, native to Africa, Asia, and Australia. Bidens pilosa var. minor has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for topical use, and it has been traditionally used to treat fever, headache, and digestive problems, while also providing relief from symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis.
